creator: p88f@yahoo.com
text:
Hi folks,

I have experienced the same dreadful message "No CD/DVD devices found!
..." while trying to install FreeBSD 6.1. This happens after I
partitioned the drive, set some installation options, and proceeded to
install from CD-ROM.

This is puzzling, because I booted from the CD. The CD-ROM is a Mitsumi
FX140, I think this is a plain ATAPI CD-ROM.

This is my first contact with FreeBSD. I'll be happy to provide more
info if needed, but please give me detailed instructions on how to
capture log files, etc. I'm new to FreeBSD ...

Thanks,

Peter
